example: Can I have a volunteer to come up on stage?
ja: ボランティア、自発的に参加する人

example: It's a bit of an obstacle course.
Maybe it was just that it was lack of motivation.
Thoughts will have started flirting into your mind.
zh: （此處比喻）輕率地出現，若有若無地出現
ja: （ここでは比喩的に）軽く現れる、ちらつく

example: Those kind of self-limiting thoughts like, I can't do that.
I had to programme my mind for success.
zh: 為成功而調整（編程）自己的心態
ja: 成功のために自分の心をプログラムする

example: I started to listen to guided visualisations to programme my subconscious mind.
ja: 視覚化、イメージトレーニング

example: I've become totally negative and self-sabotaging.
I went travelling to Australia in the hope of having an epiphany.
Your destiny is determined by the choices you make.
I had to get my mind to be on the same wavelength as me.
zh: 波長，比喻想法或感覺一致
ja: 波長（比喩的に考えや感覚の一致）

example: Help to empower them to build successful businesses.
ja: 権限を与える、力を与える

example: I put their faces on mockups of the front cover.
I became more and more self-defeatist.
ja: 自己敗北主義的な、消極的な
